objective: Produce the phase-specific notebook-backed governance evidence required to reopen the first bounded P2 legacy-stub code write.

requirements.title: Create the bounded P2S blocker package
Make the bounded P2 governance blocker explicit
Produce notebook-backed governance evidence for the blocked P2 write
Expand the admissible future evidence surface to include L90
Reopen the blocked P2 code-write validation under child-plan authority
Synchronize the parent plan and governance trackers truthfully
Commit and push before resuming P2

child_acts.description: Freeze the certified legacy-stub backlog and exact MCP denial.
Produce notebook-backed governance evidence and generated verification output.
Reopen the blocked validation, synchronize trackers, validate, commit, and push.
